title: cremanthodium atroviolaceum
intro: Cremanthodium atroviolaceum, also known as the dark violet daisy, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Compositae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties. The health benefits of Cremanthodium atroviolaceum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe digestive issues. Cremanthodium atroviolaceum is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to promote overall well-being and treat various ailments.
